```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;">

 <svg viewBox="0 0 600 320" style="width:100%;height:auto;" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="'Maple Mono', monospace">

  <!-- prompt -->
  <rect x="240" y="10" width="120" height="32" rx="8" fill="#2C3E50"/>
  <text x="300" y="31" text-anchor="middle" fill="#FFB84D" font-size="14" font-weight="700">prompt</text>
  <line x1="300" y1="42" x2="300" y2="62" stroke="#9B8EA0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <polygon points="300,68 295,60 305,60" fill="#9B8EA0"/>

  <!-- planner -->
  <rect x="200" y="70" width="200" height="40" rx="10" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#2C8475" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="300" y="86" text-anchor="middle" fill="#3DA18A" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1.5">PLANNER</text>
  <text x="300" y="102" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1F5E54" font-size="13" font-weight="700">writes SPEC.md</text>

  <line x1="300" y1="110" x2="300" y2="128" stroke="#9B8EA0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <polygon points="300,134 295,126 305,126" fill="#9B8EA0"/>

  <!-- sprint contract -->
  <rect x="220" y="135" width="160" height="28" rx="14" fill="#F4F2FB" stroke="#5654A2" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/>
  <text x="300" y="153" text-anchor="middle" fill="#5654A2" font-size="11" font-weight="700">sprint contract</text>

  <line x1="300" y1="163" x2="300" y2="180" stroke="#9B8EA0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <polygon points="300,186 295,178 305,178" fill="#9B8EA0"/>

  <!-- generator + evaluator -->
  <rect x="50" y="190" width="220" height="78" rx="10" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#C4881A" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="160" y="208" text-anchor="middle" fill="#C4881A" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1.5">GENERATOR</text>
  <text x="160" y="226" text-anchor="middle" fill="#7A5410" font-size="13" font-weight="700">writes code</text>
  <text x="160" y="248" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9B8EA0" font-size="10">reads SPEC</text>
  <text x="160" y="262" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9B8EA0" font-size="10">writes REVIEW.md</text>

  <line x1="270" y1="220" x2="330" y2="220" stroke="#9B8EA0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <line x1="270" y1="240" x2="330" y2="240" stroke="#9B8EA0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <polygon points="334,220 326,216 326,224" fill="#9B8EA0"/>
  <polygon points="266,240 274,236 274,244" fill="#9B8EA0"/>

  <rect x="330" y="190" width="220" height="78" rx="10" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#D45F47" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="440" y="208" text-anchor="middle" fill="#D45F47" font-size="9" letter-spacing="1.5">EVALUATOR</text>
  <text x="440" y="226" text-anchor="middle" fill="#7A2418" font-size="13" font-weight="700">tests outputs</text>
  <text x="440" y="248" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9B8EA0" font-size="10">interactive checks</text>
  <text x="440" y="262" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9B8EA0" font-size="10">scores vs rubric</text>

  <!-- git commits -->
  <line x1="300" y1="278" x2="300" y2="295" stroke="#9B8EA0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <rect x="195" y="282" width="210" height="26" rx="13" fill="#1E1E2E"/>
  <text x="300" y="300" text-anchor="middle" fill="#27C93F" font-size="11" font-weight="700">git commit · next sprint or done</text>

 </svg>

</div>
```
